_comment: Labeled regression corpus for lead_discovery_service.score_intent. Add new real-world examples to the matching list as edge cases are discovered. 'seeker' = must be saved (score >= SAVE_THRESHOLD); 'spam' = self-promo/scam, must score 0.0 via the negative gate; 'chatter' = harmless low-signal comments that must stay below the threshold. Targets enforced by test_intent_corpus_regression.py: seeker recall >= 0.9, spam rejection = 1.0, chatter rejection >= 0.9.
